reason: Sandbox blocks writes to /workspace/task/tests/test_outputs.py (EACCES on every Write/Edit attempt) and the Bash tool is failing on every invocation with 'EACCES: permission denied, mkdir /home/worker/.claude/session-env', so docker validation is also unrunnable. The two flagged rubrics (solution_uniqueness_guard, tests_verify_behavior_not_text) both require rewriting the test oracle — instruction.md edits alone cannot fix tests that string-match against gold-specific names (class ResendImpl, EmailImplType.Resend, new ResendImpl()) or that lack any behavioral subprocess.run invocation against the fixed code. /workspace/task/instruction.md and /workspace/task/eval_manifest.yaml are writable, but the test_outputs.py fix is not actionable from this environment. Recommend re-running fix_quality where /workspace/task/tests is writable.
